lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Well-met!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: I am Daer Krand, an old student of Zandar Horfyre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You certainly look the part.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Yes. And you are?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm [player name], an adventurer.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: It's a pleasure to make your acquaintance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And yours.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you here?

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Great question! I have a better one...

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: What is the Elixir of Everlasting?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Some kind of life extending potion?

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Exactly! This table here is full of notes on the topic. Plenty of warnings that seem to be scribbled over the top in a rather rushed manner...

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Sorry... I tend to ramble when excited.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think you can recreate this elixir?

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Me? Pah! I'm a dab hand at magic but my herblore has always been somewhat lacking. I'd go to the druids in Taverley but they don't trust us anymore... Know of any talented herbalists in the vicinity?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't say I've met anyone that springs to mind.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: That's a shame.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm world renowned at herblore. Perhaps I can help?

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Next time, lead with that...

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Anywho, I've yet to completely make sense of all these notes. Some must have been placed elsewhere.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Maybe that loathsome vampyre wandering about knows something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The one roaming around lighting candles? He doesn't seem totally with it.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Hmm, you might be right. He'll be of no use...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well then, if you do find the missing notes, I'm always happy to help.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Yes? Oh, of course! Keep your eyes peeled when you're down here. If you see anything of interest, you know where to find me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Yes... Good day!

sections.title: Talking again while holding the puzzle box

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Good work!

lines.speaker: Daer Krand
lines.text: Here, solve this for me. I need to keep working on these notes.
